prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 3S-GTE (Gen 2, 305hp with forged internals) from a Toyota MR2 Turbo (SW20), retaining the original RA25's 5-speed W55 transmission but reinforcing it with a Kaaz 1.5-way LSD and a Fidanza aluminum flywheel for quicker rev matching.

Full custom turbo system using a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold, custom 3-inch downpipe, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller to target 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) on 98 RON fuel with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing fuel and ignition via ID1000 injectors and a Walbro 450LPH fuel pump.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the RA25's 7th-gen Celica chassis), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the front control arms, and a Cusco front strut tower bar (part #602 301 A) to reduce chassis flex under hard cornering.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Pandem Design) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping to match the original RA25's rally heritage.

OEM+ JDM-spec Toyota Celica RA25 rear wing (part #53211-20010) repainted in satin black, combined with a custom front lip from Vertex Lang (part #VL-001) and a set of Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +20 wheels with 205/50R15 Yokohama Advan A052 tires for period-correct stance.

Full interior retrim with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (part #12013800), and a custom roll cage from AutoPower Industries (bolt-in 6-point, part #AP6000) painted in Toyota Racing Development (TRD) red.
